title: I'm Rosie
caption: She came out of nowhere on a scooter, nearly took Chloe off her feet, and then looked up with a gap-toothed grin like this was just how you made friends. "Sorry! Who are you? Are you new? You look new." Before Chloe could answer any of these, the girl stuck out her hand with the gravity of someone signing a treaty. "I'm Rosie." Chloe said hi. She was already a little in love with her.
story_notes: Chloe meets Rosie, who nearly runs her over on a scooter and introduces herself with enormous self-possession. Chloe is immediately charmed.
